title: elaphoglossum carrascoense
intro: Elaphoglossum carrascoense, also known as Carrasco's Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Elaphoglossum carrascoense can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
